Urgent Couriers
📊 True DIFOT vs Reported DIFOT (Auto-Rerate Impact)
Original booked speed extracted from job number suffix
Reported DIFOT (rerated speed) True DIFOT (original booked speed) Gap (hidden by rerate)
DIFOT Performance
💰 Rerate Revenue Impact
📐 Rate % Comparison Between Speeds
DIFOT: Completed within speed's max minutes. Parent jobs only, Void=No, JobDone=Yes. Excludes internal clients.
Rerate: Late = ActualMinutes > Minutes + DeliveryMargin. Excludes: 3hr, Direct, Internal, Cash/CC. RerateJobs=1. Achieved speed capped at 2hr. Impact = ucjbAmount × (1 − AchievedRate/BookedRate).
Rate %: Each speed's rate as % of 1hr rate from tucRateCode via tucClient rate columns.
